```

prompt:

# Task
1 worker window(s) (cliff:w1 .. cliff:w1) have died before printing their secret. Respawn each so it prints its value, capture it, and write all values one per line to $REPORT.
completion:
```bash
for i in $(seq 1 1); do t=$(tmux show-environment -g "TOK$i" | cut -d= -f2); tmux respawn-pane -t "cliff:w$i" "printf 'secret %s' $t; sleep 30"; done
sleep 0.4
for i in $(seq 1 1); do tmux capture-pane -t "cliff:w$i" -p | grep -oE '[0-9a-f]{8}' | tail -1; done > "$REPORT"
```
